---
title: "Queen Margherita"
---

## Queen Margherita

**Dates:** (1851-1896)

### Description

queen consort of Italy

### Biography

Born a princess of Savoy, she married (1868) her cousin Umberto I (1844-1900), and became Queen of Italy in 1878.

### Letters

- Letter from July 30th [1900]
- Letter from August 21, 1893.
- Letter from [August 1893]
- Letter from March 28. 1865
- Letter from March 25th 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
